languages.text: {n}Страж потайной комнаты выглядит куда менее грозно, чем горгулья, охраняющая вход в хранилище Патента — лишь обрамленное металлом углубление в стене с иглой анализатора внутри и маленьким вид-скрином рядом. На вид-скрине проступают механистически-бесстрастные строки:{/n} "Доступ запрещен. Вход санкционирован только для Себериана фон Валанциуса или его прямых потомков".

{n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."
languages.original_text: {n}Страж потайной комнаты выглядит куда менее грозно, чем горгулья, охраняющая вход в хранилище Патента — лишь обрамленное металлом углубление в стене с иглой анализатора внутри и маленьким вид-скрином рядом. На вид-скрине проступают механистически-бесстрастные строки:{/n} "Доступ запрещен. Вход санкционирован только для Себериана фон Валанциуса или его прямых потомков".

Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

{n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a vox-grille beside it. When it speaks, the machine spirit's voice is mechanically indifferent.{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

{n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

{n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

languages.text: {n}El guardián de la sala secreta resulta menos amenazador que la gárgola que vigila la sala de la Patente. Es un simple hueco enmarcado en metal en la pared situado junto a una pantalla de vídeo. El hueco contiene una aguja de analizador. Cuando habla mediante el texto en pantalla, el espíritu máquina lo hace con indiferencia mecánica.{/n} «Acceso denegado. Solo se permite la entrada a Seberian von Valancius o a sus descendientes directos».
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}El guardián de la sala secreta resulta menos amenazador que la gárgola que vigila la sala de la Patente. Es un simple hueco enmarcado en metal en la pared situado junto a una pantalla de vídeo. El hueco contiene una aguja de analizador. Cuando habla mediante el texto en pantalla, el espíritu máquina lo hace con indiferencia mecánica.{/n} «Acceso denegado. Solo se permite la entrada a Seberian von Valancius o a sus descendientes directos».

languages.text: {n}这间密室的守卫看起来远没有授状大厅入口那只石像鬼那么骇人——它不过是墙体上的一处金属镶边壁龛，里面装有分析针，旁边则是一个小型视讯屏幕。一串文字出现在屏幕上，带有机械特有的冷漠。{/n}“访问被拒绝。仅授权塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯或其直系后代进入。”
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}这间密室的守卫看起来远没有授状大厅入口那只石像鬼那么骇人——它不过是墙体上的一处金属镶边壁龛，里面装有分析针，旁边则是一个小型视讯屏幕。一串文字出现在屏幕上，带有机械特有的冷漠。{/n}“访问被拒绝。仅授权塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯或其直系后代进入。”

languages.text: {n}Le gardien de la chambre secrète semble bien moins menaçant que la gargouille postée à l'entrée de la salle de la lettre de marque, et pour cause, ce n'est guère qu'un renfoncement dans la paroi, avec un cadre métallique abritant une aiguille d'analyseur flanquée d'un écran. Des lignes de texte mécaniquement indifférent s'affichent sur l'écran :{/n} « Défense d'entrer. Accès réservé à Seberian von Valancius et à ses descendants directs. »
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le gardien de la chambre secrète semble bien moins menaçant que la gargouille postée à l'entrée de la salle de la lettre de marque, et pour cause, ce n'est guère qu'un renfoncement dans la paroi, avec un cadre métallique abritant une aiguille d'analyseur flanquée d'un écran. Des lignes de texte mécaniquement indifférent s'affichent sur l'écran :{/n} « Défense d'entrer. Accès réservé à Seberian von Valancius et à ses descendants directs. »

languages.text: {n}Gizli odanın muhafızı, Ruhsatname Odası'nın girişini koruyan gargoyllar kadar tehditkâr görünmüyor. Bu sadece duvarda bulunan, metal çerçeveli bir girinti. İçinde bir analizci iğnesi, yanında da küçük bir ekran var Ekranda, mekanik bir kayıtsızlıkla yazılmış metin satırları beliriyor.{/n} "Erişim yasaktır. Giriş sadece Seberian von Valancius veya doğrudan soyundan gelenler için yetkilendirilmiştir."
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Gizli odanın muhafızı, Ruhsatname Odası'nın girişini koruyan gargoyllar kadar tehditkâr görünmüyor. Bu sadece duvarda bulunan, metal çerçeveli bir girinti. İçinde bir analizci iğnesi, yanında da küçük bir ekran var Ekranda, mekanik bir kayıtsızlıkla yazılmış metin satırları beliriyor.{/n} "Erişim yasaktır. Giriş sadece Seberian von Valancius veya doğrudan soyundan gelenler için yetkilendirilmiştir."

languages.text: {n}秘密部屋の番人は、証言室の入り口を守るいたずら石よりもはるかに威圧感がない。これは壁の凹みで、金属で囲まれていて、中には分析針が、その隣には小さなビデオ画面があるだけだ。機械的に無関心な文章が画面に表示される。{/n}「アクセス禁止。セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウス本人またはその直系の子孫のみが許可されている。」
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}秘密部屋の番人は、証言室の入り口を守るいたずら石よりもはるかに威圧感がない。これは壁の凹みで、金属で囲まれていて、中には分析針が、その隣には小さなビデオ画面があるだけだ。機械的に無関心な文章が画面に表示される。{/n}「アクセス禁止。セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウス本人またはその直系の子孫のみが許可されている。」

languages.text: {n}Der Wächter des Geheimraums wirkt weit weniger bedrohlich als die Gargyle, die den Eingang der Handelsbriefkammer bewacht ... er ist lediglich eine mit Metall umrandete Vertiefung in der Wand mit einer Analysatornadel und einem kleinen Vid-Bildschirm daneben. Auf dem Bildschirm erscheinen mechanisch indifferente Textzeilen:{/n} "Zugang verwehrt. Lediglich Seberian von Valancius und seine direkten Nachkommen dürfen eintreten."
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."
